evals.prompt: I just finished adding a new CSV parser to the pi-structured-return package. Open a PR for me.
evals.expected_output: PR title: feat(pi-structured-return): add CSV parser. Description should have 1-3 terse bullet points focusing on what was added, not how it was implemented.

evals.prompt: I fixed a bug in pi-spinner-verbs where null responses weren't being handled. Create a PR.
evals.expected_output: PR title: fix(pi-spinner-verbs): handle null response. Bullet points should be terse, e.g., '- handle null response gracefully'

evals.prompt: I updated the GitHub Actions workflow to use a newer Node version. Open a PR.
evals.expected_output: PR title: ci(root): update Node version in workflows OR chore(root): update CI Node version. Description should be 1-2 bullet points about the change.

evals.prompt: Can you help me format a PR title? I added documentation for the new package.
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and offer to help format the PR title using conventional commits.
